overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a post-industrial wasteland filled with trash and debris, passing high-voltage transmission towers, with a futuristic neon-lit city skyline visible in the distance under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: post-industrial wasteland with trash dumps and power infrastructure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dense junkyard toward the large transmission tower

entered.detail: large metal lattice transmission tower with multiple cross-arms and power lines
multiple high-voltage power lines stretching across the sky between towers
dense accumulation of garbage, debris, and discarded materials covering the ground
brown shrubs and dry grass scattered throughout the wasteland
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon under the blue sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking through a desolate wasteland filled with trash piles and dry vegetation. The camera approaches a massive transmission tower with power lines overhead, while distant mountains frame the background under clear skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone between wasteland and urban cityscape

events.description: futuristic city skyline with skyscrapers becomes visible in the distance beyond the transmission towers

agents.ego_description: passing close to the transmission tower while approaching the edge of the junkyard overlooking the city

entered.detail: dense cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings and skyscrapers visible in the distance
elevated highway structure with support columns spanning across the landscape
tall modern glass and steel buildings forming the downtown cityscape

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the massive transmission tower, looking up at its structure and the power lines. As the character moves forward, the scene transitions to reveal a stunning view of a futuristic city skyline with towering skyscrapers and a highway overpass in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: wasteland overlook with panoramic city view

events.description: holographic billboards on the skyscrapers become clearly visible as the camera pans across the cityscape

agents.ego_description: panning across the city skyline while walking along the junkyard edge, surveying the urban landscape

entered.detail: large colorful digital advertisements and signs mounted on the sides of skyscrapers
additional transmission tower structure visible on the right side of the frame

segments.scene_description: The final segment showcases a panoramic view of the futuristic city from the trash-filled wasteland. The camera pans across the skyline, revealing detailed skyscrapers adorned with bright holographic billboards, while the highway overpass stretches across the middle ground. The contrast between the derelict foreground and the gleaming metropolis creates a striking cyberpunk atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a desolate wasteland that gradually reveals a gleaming, futuristic metropolis on the horizon. It begins by navigating through piles of trash and dry vegetation, moving steadily toward a massive transmission tower with power lines stretching overhead against a backdrop of distant mountains. As the camera passes beneath the towering metal structure, the perspective shifts to uncover a stunning view of a distant city skyline and a sprawling highway overpass. The scene then expands into a wide panoramic sweep, contrasting the derelict foreground with towering skyscrapers adorned with bright holographic billboards. Finally, the camera lingers on the striking juxtaposition between the industrial decay of the wasteland and the neon brilliance of the cyberpunk city.
